result.stdout:
Kafka Command Line Tool (kafka-cli) allows you to manage topics and produce/consume messages to/from Kafka cluster.

Usage: kafka-cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  config        Configure Kafka CLI
  message       Produce and consume messages
  topic         Manage topics

Run 'kafka-cli [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
Produce and consume messages

Usage: kafka-cli message [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  consume       Consume a message
  produce       Produce a message to the Kafka topic

Run 'message [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Produce and consume messages

Usage: kafka-cli message [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  consume       Consume a message
  produce       Produce a message to the Kafka topic

Run 'message [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Consume a message

Usage: kafka-cli message consume [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  -t|--topic    Topic name
  -g|--group    Group ID
  -c|--commit   Commit the message. This prevents from receiving the same
                message twice for the one Group ID.
  -p|--pause    Pause between producing messages in milliseconds
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
Consume a message

Usage: kafka-cli message consume [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  -t|--topic    Topic name
  -g|--group    Group ID
  -c|--commit   Commit the message. This prevents from receiving the same
                message twice for the one Group ID.
  -p|--pause    Pause between producing messages in milliseconds
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
Produce a message to the Kafka topic

Usage: kafka-cli message produce [options] <Message> [[--] <arg>...]

Arguments:
  Message       Text message to produce

Options:
  -t|--topic    Topic name
  -n|--number   Number of messages that should be produced
  -p|--pause    Pause between producing messages in milliseconds
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

commands.payload:

Options:

  -p|--pause    Pause between producing messages in milliseconds
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
Manage topics

Usage: kafka-cli topic [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  create        Create Topic
  delete        Delete a topic
  list          List add topics

Run 'topic [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Create Topic

Usage: kafka-cli topic create [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.
  -t|--topic       Topic name
  -p|--partitions  Number of partitions

List add topics

Usage: kafka-cli topic list [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  -f|--filter   Text that should be included in a topic name
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
